title: Ultra Pickaxes
description: This mod adds a variety of 3 Pickaxes that you can break blocks with a grid of 2x2, 3x3 and 5x5
body:
**This mod adds a variety of 3 Pickaxes that you can break blocks with a grid of 2x2, 3x3 and 5x5**

**The Stone Pickaxe can mine 2x2,**
![Stone Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc43d1de57e97b7c9ac826e3f29f05614d0163cc.png)

**The Iron Pickaxe can mine 3x3,**
![Iron Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c70add79a7014970dd8fa4f55489b94a0996ad85.png)

**The Diamond Pickaxe can mine 5x5**
![Diamond Pickaxe Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4943edfeefc954eaf11f444a9c330d151e8800af.png)
